requests.name: Baby cot with mattress

This family of nine, with seven children aged between 7 months and 19 years old, lives in a small 2-room rental flat in Yishun. Several of the children are still financially dependent, including school-going children and a young child with developmental needs, placing significant caregiving and financial demands on the parents. Despite both parents working hard to support the family, they continue to face financial difficulties managing daily necessities, food expenses, milk, diapers, and the children’s ongoing needs. With limited resources and a crowded living space, the family is unable to afford a a proper baby cot and mattress for their infant.

The donated baby cot would provide the baby with a safer and more comfortable sleeping space, while helping to ease the burden on this large family.

requests.description:
We would like to seek support for a family currently facing significant caregiving challenges.

The daughter is presently unemployed as she is the sole full-time caregiver to her 90-year-old mother, who is living with dementia and multiple medical conditions. In addition, she is also caring for her brother who struggles with mental health issues. The family’s caregiving responsibilities have placed considerable emotional, physical, and financial strain on her. 
3 of them are currently staying together at a 1-room apartment. Daughter does not request for too much, but just the necessary supplies for her mother.  

We are appealing to kind donors for assistance with essential caregiving supplies to support the family’s daily needs. The requested items are:

Adult diapers: Lille Suprem Fit Adult Diapers. L size (105-150cm)
Bed pads: ASSURE underpads 75 x 75 cm
Adult body wipes: Hospicare 40R Adult Body wipes

Your contribution, no matter the amount or quantity, would greatly ease the family’s burden and help maintain the dignity, comfort, and hygiene of their loved ones.

We sincerely appreciate your generosity and support during this difficult period. 
Please contact me via whatsapp @ 8518 3526 if you are interested to donate. Thank you!
